headline: Data Scientist | Python | NLP | 3 Years Experience
summary: Data Scientist with 3 years of experience in NLP and machine learning. Built text classification and sentiment analysis models. Familiar with Python and scikit-learn. Currently learning about LLMs and RAG systems through online courses. Good communicator with experience presenting findings to business stakeholders.
experience_text:
- Data Scientist at Infosys (2022 - Present): Built sentiment analysis model using BERT for customer feedback. Created text classification pipeline using scikit-learn and Python. Worked with SQL databases and created dashboards in Tableau. Presented monthly reports to business team.
- Junior Data Analyst at Wipro (2021 - 2022): Data cleaning and preprocessing using Python and Pandas. Built basic ML models for churn prediction. Created visualisations using Matplotlib and Seaborn.
education_text: B.Tech in Computer Science, Pune University
